windows.description: Opens to a 'SUPPLIES FOR CANDLES' branded title card.
windows.description_detailed: Opens to a 'SUPPLIES FOR CANDLES' branded title card. intro phase, ~0% in, 0:00–0:08.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Finished blue layered candle teaser, then hands peel a wick sticker; caption 'Peel off the wick stick and place it onto the end of the candle wick'.
windows.description_detailed: Finished blue layered candle teaser, then hands peel a wick sticker; caption 'Peel off the wick stick and place it onto the end of the candle wick'. prep phase, ~7% in, 0:08–0:16. Terminology: wick priming, wick bar.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Peel off the other side and place the wick in the middle of your candle glass'; wick fixed into the glass.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Peel off the other side and place the wick in the middle of your candle glass'; wick fixed into the glass. prep phase, ~14% in, 0:16–0:24. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: White wax flakes in a metal bowl; captions 'split your measured wax into three separate bowls' and 'Fill your pan halfway with boiling water'.
windows.description_detailed: White wax flakes in a metal bowl; captions 'split your measured wax into three separate bowls' and 'Fill your pan halfway with boiling water'. prep phase, ~21% in, 0:24–0:32.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Melt your first wax layer ... and stir until melted'; wax melting in the bowl over the water bath.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Melt your first wax layer ... and stir until melted'; wax melting in the bowl over the water bath. process phase, ~29% in, 0:32–0:40. Terminology: double boiler.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Dark blue dye added and stirred in; caption 'For your dark colour add around ten drops of your chosen dye and stir'.
windows.description_detailed: Dark blue dye added and stirred in; caption 'For your dark colour add around ten drops of your chosen dye and stir'. process phase, ~36% in, 0:40–0:48.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Wait until your wax has cooled to 61°C then add your chosen fragrance'; stirring the blue wax.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Wait until your wax has cooled to 61°C then add your chosen fragrance'; stirring the blue wax. process phase, ~43% in, 0:48–0:57.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Transfer your wax into a pouring jug then slowly pour your mix into your glass'; first dark layer poured.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Transfer your wax into a pouring jug then slowly pour your mix into your glass'; first dark layer poured. assemble phase, ~50% in, 0:57–1:05. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Second layer prepared; captions about adding the wick-centering tool, waiting ~2 hours, and adding ~5 dye drops for the mid colour.
windows.description_detailed: Second layer prepared; captions about adding the wick-centering tool, waiting ~2 hours, and adding ~5 dye drops for the mid colour. assemble phase, ~57% in, 1:05–1:13.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Slowly pour your next layer and wait around 2 hours before pouring the next layer'; second blue layer poured.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Slowly pour your next layer and wait around 2 hours before pouring the next layer'; second blue layer poured. assemble phase, ~64% in, 1:13–1:21. Terminology: repour.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Melt the wax for your last layer and add one drop for your light colour'; lightest layer tinted.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Melt the wax for your last layer and add one drop for your light colour'; lightest layer tinted. assemble phase, ~71% in, 1:21–1:29.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Caption 'Slowly pour your last layer'; the final light-blue layer poured into the glass.
windows.description_detailed: Caption 'Slowly pour your last layer'; the final light-blue layer poured into the glass. assemble phase, ~79% in, 1:29–1:37. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: Finished blue ombre layered candle with white flowers; caption 'Leave your candle to set overnight before lighting'.
windows.description_detailed: Finished blue ombre layered candle with white flowers; caption 'Leave your candle to set overnight before lighting'. assemble phase, ~86% in, 1:37–1:45.

windows.video_title: How To Make A Layered Candle 🕯️| Supplies For Candles
windows.description: 'THANK YOU FOR WATCHING' end card with flowers.
windows.description_detailed: 'THANK YOU FOR WATCHING' end card with flowers. aux phase, ~93% in, 1:45–1:54.
